context.projectOverview: agent-bober: a multi-agent harness that builds applications autonomously using any LLM. ESM/TypeScript strict CLI + MCP server. Phase 3 of the chattable-team platform adds a durable semantic-facts memory type plus lesson hygiene. This sprint introduces the project's FIRST relational store.

decisionsLocked.Q1: B — SQLite via better-sqlite3 (synchronous, Node>=18). NOT node:sqlite (needs Node 22.5+). Hidden behind a FactStore interface so the driver is swappable.
decisionsLocked.purity: Never call Date.now()/new Date() inside the store, distill, or reconcile cores — timestamps are injected at the CLI/caller boundary.
decisionsLocked.ids: Deterministic content hash sha256(`${scope}|${subject}|${predicate}|${value}|${tCreated}`).slice(0,16), mirroring lessonIdFromSignature in distill.ts.

principles: Read .bober/principles.md directly. KEY GATES: TypeScript strict (zero type errors = hard gate); ESLint flat config with consistent-type-imports (use `import type`); ESM everywhere with .js import specifiers for NodeNext; Zod for all config/input validation; no synchronous fs in app code (node:fs/promises) — NOTE better-sqlite3 is synchronous by design and is the sanctioned exception for the store; filesystem state under .bober/; section comments `// -- Section ------`; conventional commits `bober(sprint-1): ...`; prefix unused params with `_`; no `any` without justification.
